BULK IMPORT
Upload a CSV of customers + contacts, dedup against existing rows.
construction
Coming soon — preview only
Same dedup-wizard pattern as Leads bulk intake — upload CSV, preview matches, gate quality before commit. Differs in that customers carry billing/shipping addresses + credit terms + contacts as a hierarchy.
WIZARD FLOW
upload_file
1
Upload CSV
Drag-and-drop or browse to select a CSV. Header row required; column aliases auto-detected.
compare_arrows
2
Match against existing rows
Server runs the same dedupe pipeline as leads bulk intake — by email, then phone, then companyName + state.
rule
3
Review per-row status
Each row gets a chip: Created / DuplicateExisting / Invalid / MissingRequiredField. Operator chooses to skip or override.
cloud_don

WORKER QUEUE
Pull-based queue for high-volume outreach. Single-keystroke dispositions, J/K to advance.
speed
Ready to work

Pull a slice of leads and the queue serves them one at a time. Two reps pulling at the same time get disjoint slices — no overlap.

storefront
settings
BULK INTAKE
Upload a list, dedup against existing leads + suppression, gate quality before commit.
1
Pick the strategy
Strategy
Cold Call
Campaign tag (optional)

The strategy drives which fields are required and which suppression channel is checked. Cold-call needs phone; cold-email needs email; trade-show follow-up accepts either.

2
Provide the data

Header row required. Recognized columns: companyName, contactName, email, phone, source, notes (case-insensitive, common variants accepted).

Expected CSV columns

Column matching is case-insensitive and the listed aliases all map to the same field. Only `companyName` is required; the rest can be left blank without blocking the upload.

HEADER	REQUIRED?	ALSO ACCEPTED
companyName	
REQUIRED
	co

SEGMENTS
Saved cross-customer filter sets for marketing + reporting.
construction
Coming soon — preview only
Define a filter (e.g. "open AR > $10K AND industry = aerospace AND last order < 90 days"), save it as a named segment, and reuse across reports, marketing campaigns, and dashboards.
EXAMPLE SEGMENTS
filter_alt
High-Value Aerospace
~12

AS9100-certified customers with > $10K open AR. Useful for the quarterly account-review cadence.

isAerospace = true AND openInvoiceTotal > $10K
filter_alt
ITAR-cleared Reference Pool
~4

Defense customers cleared for ITAR work who have also opted in as references for similar prospects.

isItarControlled = true AND isReferenceOk = true
filter_alt
Dormant > 90 Days
~27

Active customers with no order in the last quarte
